name: @monolith/cms-embedded
description: Plug & Play Content Management System for Next.js websites - No separate hosting needed
author: Your Name

scripts.postinstall:
echo '
✅ Monolith CMS installed successfully!

Next steps:
1. Read: ./node_modules/@monolith/cms-embedded/EMERGENT_INSTALL.md
2. Or manually copy files from ./node_modules/@monolith/cms-embedded/
3. Set environment variables in .env.local
4. Add data-cms-id to editable elements
5. Include <script src="/cms-client.js" /> in your pages/_document.js

Documentation: ./node_modules/@monolith/cms-embedded/README.md
'
